name: agent-org
description: Skylence agent-org v2 in a box (operator redesign 2026-06-10). Bundles the Solo MCP server (the board/PTY/timer substrate every role depends on) plus 4 role skills (orchestrator, solo-worker, replacer, org-audit), 2 session-discipline hooks (org-lane-mark PreToolUse marker on Solo spawn/timer tools + org-stop-gate anti-idle Stop gate), the build-slot machine-wide compile serializer, a ghost-probe script implementing the field-validated ghost-text-vs-live-typing PTY check (no-fusion law), and the Codex-side conduct pack (AGENTS.md, execpolicy org rules, solo-worker Codex skill).
